name: Livento Group, Inc.
summary: PART I . Prior Operations ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY We were incorporated in the State of Nevada on October 30, 2013, under the name Bling Marketing, Inc.. Until December 29, 2014, we were a wholesaler of jewelry, principally earrings, rings, and pendants (BMI Business). We recognized a minimal amount of sales from operations before the three months ending June 30, 2014, and were accordingly classified as a shell company.
